# SSOT Dependency Map

<!-- Code generated by go run ./tools/ssotdeps render; DO NOT EDIT. -->

> Riido task: RIID-4754

This projection is generated from `ssot-dependency-map.riido.json`.
Regenerate it with `go run ./tools/ssotdeps render`.

## Rule

One durable fact has one owner. Downstream repositories may repeat that fact only as local execution, projection, or harness behavior.

A lower-layer contradiction must be recorded locally, escalated to the owning SSOT when meaning changes, then regenerated downstream.

## Facts

| ID | Fact | Owner | Downstreams |

| `active-assignment-heartbeat-stale-lease` | Daemon sends active assignment heartbeats every 5 seconds; control-plane treats 20 seconds without refresh as stale and must not let late traffic revive the lease | `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md` | riido-control-plane, riido-daemon, riido-client |

### `active-assignment-heartbeat-stale-lease`

- Human phrase: Active assignment heartbeat and stale lease fencing
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md` requires `assignment heartbeat every 5 seconds`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md` requires `not been refreshed for 20 seconds`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: uses a 20 second default active-assignment lease, fails stale active assignments during poll/heartbeat, and does not refresh expired leases
  - `riido-daemon`: uses a 5 second default heartbeat cadence and cancels local provider runs when heartbeat response omits a requested active assignment
  - `riido-client`: no generated client or visible thread API change; frontend sees existing typed thread/SSE state changes

### `agent-concept`

- Human phrase: Agent means a task-assignable abstraction of a configured runtime
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-policy.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-policy.md` requires `Agent`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: HTTP handlers, stores, fixture data, and generated client projection
  - `riido-daemon`: runtime execution after assignment
  - `riido-infra`: deployment requirement interpretation only

- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-configuration.md`

  - `riido-client`: button state and user-facing affordance

- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: checked-in OpenAPI copy, HTTP test behavior, and generated client handoff
  - `riido-client`: generated TypeScript/React Query consumer surface

### `device-runtime-liveness-stale-projection`

- Human phrase: Device/runtime liveness snapshot and stale projection
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/device-principal.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/device-principal.md` requires `daemon runtime snapshot every 5 seconds`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/device-principal.md` requires `daemon process facts`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/device-principal.md` requires `not been refreshed for 20 seconds`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/device-principal.md` requires `stale runtimes must not be used for newly derived `AgentRuntimeBinding``
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: projects daemon process facts, stale device daemons/runtimes as offline/missing in client reads, and excludes stale runtimes from newly derived daemon agent bindings
  - `riido-daemon`: sends daemon process facts inside the aggregated daemon runtime snapshot on the 5 second heartbeat cadence even when no assignment is active
  - `riido-client`: no generated route or response-shape change; existing runtime availability, detection, and daemon-detail fields drive UI state

### `experimental-runtime-opt-in-assignment-snapshot`

- Human phrase: Experimental runtime opt-in is assignment-created snapshot data
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/assignment-polling.md` requires `Assignment.allow_experimental_runtime`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-policy.md` requires `requires experimental opt-in`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: derives Assignment.allow_experimental_runtime from the selected agent runtime capability at assignment creation time
  - `riido-daemon`: uses only Assignment.allow_experimental_runtime for the experimental runtime scheduling gate
  - `riido-infra`: no Terraform diff

### `fixture-created-agent-normal-lifecycle`

- Human phrase: Fixture-created agents are ordinary agents
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-onboarding.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-onboarding.md` requires `fixture-created agents are ordinary agents`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/api-contract-projection.md` requires `duplicate display names are allowed and are not auto-suffixed`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: fixture create keeps submitted duplicate names and reuses normal agent update/delete/editability behavior
  - `riido-client`: renders display names without treating them as identity; uses agent_id and generated lifecycle calls
  - `riido-daemon`: does not branch on fixture origin; assignment snapshots are keyed by agent_id
  - `riido-infra`: no Terraform diff unless a future fixture registry, media, search, durability, or evidence axis appears

### `generated-assignment-excludes-team-openapi-key`

- Human phrase: Generated assignment excludes team/OpenAPI key
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-policy.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-policy.md` requires `are outside the AI Agent assignment problem`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: private task context may resolve task location from task_id internally, but generated client requests and deployment/smoke criteria do not require team_id, OpenAPI keys, or Open API keys
  - `riido-client`: calls generated assignment with agent_id in the body and route-supplied task/workspace ids only
  - `riido-daemon`: polls and executes assignment snapshots without receiving team_id or OpenAPI workspace keys
  - `riido-infra`: does not treat team_id/OpenAPI/Open API task-context key configuration as generated-assignment deployment evidence

### `onboarding-draft-ordering`

- Human phrase: Onboarding draft ordering is client-local until final workspace/runtime-scoped create
- Owner: `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-onboarding.md`
- Source refs:
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/ai-agent-onboarding.md` requires `client-local onboarding draft/configuration selection`
  - `riido-contracts:docs/20-domain/api-contract-projection.md` requires `persisted draft state or workspace-less create`
- Downstreams:
  - `riido-control-plane`: v2 final create handlers continue to require workspace_id path scope and runtime_id request validation; no persisted onboarding draft is added
  - `riido-client`: renders local fixture/direct-configuration draft state before final create
  - `riido-daemon`: receives only saved assignment/runtime snapshots after final create and assignment
  - `riido-infra`: no topology change unless a future SSOT introduces persisted drafts or storage

  - `riido-client`: participant dropdown renders the returned order and handles long labels locally

- Human phrase: `profile_thumbnail_url` is an optional HTTPS image URL string produced by the profile thumbnail upload-intent flow

## Loop Gates

- Top-down: product/design evidence -> owning contracts SSOT -> generated API/IR projection -> downstream harnesses.
- Bottom-up: implementation or operations evidence -> local SSOT finding -> owning contracts SSOT when meaning changes -> regeneration.
